entry.message: Community agent run in suggestion mode

window.operatingHours: Agent scans the current UTC day. Live-support hours come from project guidelines or project memory.

items.ignoredReason: Authored by the configured manager/bot user.

items.message:
Hey team! 👋

Today’s [**Stargazer Axiom daily thread**](https://community.outlier.ai/t/daily-thread-07-15/2904541?u=tomas.ruiz_obic) is up.

Please take a few minutes to read it before tasking today. The topic is **valid model failures**, with a reminder that a failure must be tied to an explicit prompt requirement, not just to differences from the gold patch.

Quick rule: grade the model against the prompt, not against the exact gold implementation.

Use the daily thread for blockers, Cursor issues, validation/eval problems, onboarding questions, or task-related doubts 🙌
items.ignoredReason: Manager announcement authored by the configured bot user, not a contributor support request.

items.message:
🚨 **IMPORTANT UPDATE — PLEASE READ** 🚨

Team, quick reminder: Testing

This applies to all new attempts moving forward. Please double-check before starting or continuing a task.

Thank you!
items.ignoredReason: Manager announcement authored by the configured bot user, not a contributor support request.

items.message: Hey guys, I finished my first task two days ago and it was reviewed with a score of 2, which is fair and I acknowledged it. I have redone the task and the final Eval has passed completely (6a57443bf31397886da04a24). I think now it is way better and in line with the guidelines. I hope it gets a better review, so I'm waiting on the feedback and ready to start new tasks. Thanks!
items.ignoredReason: No question or support signal detected.
Authored by the configured manager/bot user.
